title: Lightning Effect
description: The Minecraft Lightning Effect Plugin adds a dramatic lightning effect to your Minecraft server, with a unique feature that triggers lightning when a player dies.
body:
# ⚡ Lightning Kill Effect

**Stop letting players die in silence.** Turn every death into a cinematic event without turning your server into a crater. 

`Lightning Kill Effect` is a lightweight, high-performance solution for server owners who want maximum drama with zero overhead. No commands, no permissions, and **zero configuration** required. Just drop it in and let the sky speak for itself.

---

### 🚀 Why choose this plugin?

Most death-effect plugins are bloated or dangerous. This one is built for performance:
* **💨 Zero-Config (Plug-and-Play):** No `config.yml` to mess up. It works perfectly the moment you hit "Start."
* **🛡️ 100% Non-Destructive:** Uses localized visual strikes. No fire spread, no block damage, and zero harm to surrounding entities or items.
* **🧵 Ultra-Lightweight:** Written with optimization in mind to ensure zero impact on your server's TPS, even in chaotic PvP.
* 
---

### 🛠️ Technical Specifications

| Feature | Details |
| :--- | :--- |
| **API Version** | Spigot / Paper 1.21.1 |
| **Java Version** | Java 21+ |
| **Configuration** | None (Zero-Config) |
| **Impact** | Visual Only (Safe) |

---

### 📦 Installation
1. Download the `lightningKill-2.0.jar`.
2. Move it to your server's `/plugins/` folder.
3. Restart your server.
4. Test it by experiencing an in-game death!

---

### 💬 Join the Community
Have questions, need support, or want to suggest a feature? Join our Discord server to connect with other developers and users.

[**Join the Discord Server**](https://discord.gg/aFJjYYfNcY)

---

### 🤝 Support & Feedback
Found a bug? Please open an issue on the **Versions** tab or report it via our Discord. If you enjoy the plugin, leaving a star or a review helps support future updates.
